task.goal: Make a structure with the blueprint below
task.initial_team_instruction: Let's share materials and make a structure with the blueprint

replay_context.execution_state_note: cmd_start is reconstructed from each recorded cmd end timestamp minus duration_ms, then revealed to the critic only when the replay clock reaches that start. Overlapping commands are tracked independently by command_id.

message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Build the full blueprint structure at the specified coordinates. First gather or craft any missing materials needed: polished_granite, stone_bricks, polished_andesite, stone, polished_diorite, plus use inventory gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, glowstone. Travel safely to around X -343 Y 64 Z 251. Clear obstructing blocks if needed, make a safe work area, then place every required block exactly as listed by the blueprint fixes for levels Y64 through Y68. After placing all blocks, run checkBlueprint to verify completion and fix any remaining mismatches.")
!startConversation("bob", "Hey bob, I’m building the blueprint. Can you help supply/place gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone while I place the stone materials?")

!newAction("Build only blueprint Level 0 quickly. At Y64 coordinates -348..-339,246..255, place required blocks from inventory where available: gold_block and quartz_block. For missing stone/polished/brick blocks, mine nearby stone/granite/diorite/andesite if immediately accessible and craft polish/stone_bricks as needed, but prioritize placing available blocks within 10 seconds. Then stop.")

!newAction("Gather and craft materials for Level 0 fixes. Within 9 seconds: search within 32 blocks for exposed andesite, diorite, granite, and stone. Mine raw andesite/diorite/granite with diamond_pickaxe, mine stone/cobblestone as needed. Craft polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite from raw blocks. If possible craft a furnace from cobblestone and start smelting cobblestone into stone using any fuel found nearby/wood from trees, but do not wander far. Stop before timeout.")

message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Build the full blueprint structure at the specified coordinates. Travel safely to around X -343 Y 64 Z 251. Clear obstructing blocks if needed, make a safe work area, then place every required block exactly as listed by the blueprint fixes for levels Y64 through Y68. After placing all blocks, run checkBlueprint to verify completion and fix any remaining mismatches.")
!startConversation("bob", "Hey bob, I’m building the blueprint. Can you help supply/place gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone while I place the stone materials?")

!newAction("Build only blueprint Level 0 quickly. At Y64 coordinates -348..-339,246..255, place required blocks from inventory where available: gold_block and quartz_block. For missing stone/polished/brick blocks, mine nearby stone/granite/diorite/andesite if immediately accessible and craft polish/stone_bricks as needed, but prioritize placing available blocks within 10 seconds. Then stop.")

!newAction("Gather and craft materials for Level 0 fixes. Within 9 seconds: search within 32 blocks for exposed andesite, diorite, granite, and stone. Mine raw andesite/diorite/granite with diamond_pickaxe, mine stone/cobblestone as needed. Craft polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite from raw blocks. If possible craft a furnace from cobblestone and start smelting cobblestone into stone using any fuel found nearby/wood from trees, but do not wander far. Stop before timeout.")

!newAction("Continue gathering Level 0 materials from current cave area for 9 seconds. Mine nearby exposed stone, andesite, diorite, granite if reachable without long pathing, up to 20 total blocks, using diamond_pickaxe. Then report inventory. Avoid mining ores unless blocking path.")

!newAction("Use inventory crafting now: craft polished_andesite from 4 andesite. Then mine and collect nearby andesite, diorite, granite, and stone within 16 blocks for 9 seconds, making sure to walk to drops and pick them up after each block. Print inventory summary at end.")

!newAction("Return to blueprint area and place all Level 0 blocks we currently have that are still needed. Use exact coordinates from the last Level 0 fix list. Prioritize: polished_andesite (4) at required coords, gold_block at required coords, quartz_block at required coord. Also place any existing polished_granite if available. Do not place wrong block types. Then check Level 0.")

!newAction("Gather and prepare Level 0 materials efficiently. Go to nearby cave/stone area around current build, mine needed raw blocks: at least 55 andesite, 60 diorite, 4 granite, and 45 stone/cobblestone. Also mine coal if found. Craft polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite. Craft a furnace if needed and smelt cobblestone into stone using coal or wooden fuel; craft about 24 stone_bricks from stone but keep about 18 stone. Work for up to 60 seconds, collect drops, avoid danger, then print inventory summary.")
